about.title: About TextKit
about.intro: TextKit is a collection of free, browser-based text processing tools. No accounts, no tracking, no nonsense.
about.fastDesc: All tools run entirely in your browser with no server round-trips.
about.privateDesc: Your text never leaves your device. Everything stays on your machine.
about.availableDesc: No login, no rate limits. Open the site and start working immediately.
about.contact: Questions or feedback? Reach us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.noDataBody: TextKit does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data or tool inputs. All processing happens locally in your browser.
privacy.analyticsBody: We collect anonymous, aggregated visit counts. No cookies, no fingerprinting, no IP logging.
privacy.adBody: We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits.
privacy.contactBody: If you have questions, contact us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.useBody: TextKit provides free online text tools for personal and professional use. By using this site you agree to use it lawfully.
terms.warrantyBody: All tools are provided as-is without any warranty. Always verify critical results independently.
terms.liabilityBody: TextKit and its operators are not liable for any damages arising from the use of the tools on this site.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of any changes.
